name: memory-to-repo
description: Blocks CRUD on the machine-local auto-memory directory and redirects the agent to the repo's ./memory/ folder so memory is git-tracked and shared across users

interface.shortDescription: Keep agent memory version-controlled and shared
interface.longDescription: Redirects Claude Code and Codex from machine-local memory stores to the repository's ./memory directory using native cross-platform lifecycle hooks.
defaultPrompt: Audit the repository memory store for stale facts.
Refresh memory usage rankings from past sessions.
